title: React hook for detecting mobile viewport width
purpose: Provides a boolean value indicating if the current viewport width is less than 640px, updating automatically on resize events.
module_context: Exports a default hook function named useIsMobile that detects mobile viewports using window.matchMedia API.

steps.content: Initialize the mobile detection state based on current viewport width.
IF the window object is not available, return false as default.
ELSE create a media query to detect screens smaller than 640px.
Set initial state based on whether the media query matches.
Setup a resize event listener to update state when viewport changes.
IF window is not available, return early without adding listeners.
ELSE create a media query listener for viewport changes.
Add event listener to update state when media query matches change.
Return cleanup function to remove event listener on unmount.
Return the current mobile detection state value.
